creator: jeff.bachtel@gmail.com
text:
Ok, but as far as I can tell, there is nothing in the dhcpcd configuration that disables the kernel from handling RAs. So even in 12, the message itself is misleading.

If I'm wrong and you know there's definitely a configuration directive that is disabling kernel RA broadcasts, could the message be updated to reflect what the directive is?

If the kernel's RA broadcasts are disabled inherently as part of dhcpcd running (that is, it is not tied to configuration), could that be indicated instead?
